articles.author: Virginia Pietromarchi
articles.title: Is NATO at breaking point as it meets in Turkiye? - Al Jazeera
articles.description: NATO leaders gather in Ankara to tackle US-Europe tensions, defence gaps and support for Ukraine’s military resilience.
articles.content: The war in Ukraine and the fall out from the Iran conflict are high on the NATO summits agenda this week. But well before Secretary General Mark Rutte takes to the stage on Tuesday, NATOs most powerf… [+4495 chars]
